---
title: "RPC2 Descriptive analysis"
author: "Ye Ji Choi"
date: "`r lubridate::today()`"
format: 
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 5
    toc-location: left
    code-fold: true
    embed-resources: true
---

```{r libraries, echo=F, include = F}
library(tidyverse)
library(arsenal)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggrepel)
library(ggpubr)
library(readxl)
library(aws.s3)
library(jsonlite)
library(skimr)
library(naniar)
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(emmeans)
library(broom.mixed)
library(purrr)
library(knitr)

source("/Users/choiyej/GitHub/YC_CHCO/R Functions/label_harmonized_function.R")
```


```{r echo = F, warning = F, results='asis'}
user <- Sys.info()[["user"]]

if (user == "choiyej") { # local version
  root_path <- "/Users/choiyej/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UW/Bjornstad/Biostatistics Core Shared Drive"
  git_path <- "/Users/choiyej/GitHub/CHCO-Code/Petter Bjornstad"
  keys <- fromJSON("/Users/choiyej/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-TheUniversityofColoradoDenver/Bjornstad Pyle Lab/keys.json")
} else if (user == "rameshsh") { # hyak version
  root_path <- ""
  git_path <- "/mmfs1/gscratch/togo/rameshsh/CHCO-Code/Petter Bjornstad"
} else if (user == "yejichoi") { # hyak version
  root_path <- "/mmfs1/gscratch/togo/yejichoi/"
  git_path <- "/mmfs1/gscratch/togo/yejichoi/CHCO-Code/Petter Bjornstad"
  keys <- fromJSON("/mmfs1/home/yejichoi/keys.json")
} else if (user == "pylell") {
  root_path <- "/Users/pylell/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-SharedLibraries-UW/Bjornstad/Biostatistics Core Shared Drive"
  git_path <- "/Users/pylell/Documents/GitHub/CHCO-Code/Petter Bjornstad"
  keys <- fromJSON("/mmfs1/home/pylell/keys.json")
} else {
  stop("Unknown user: please specify root path for this user.")
}

## Create an S3 client
keys <- fromJSON("/Users/choiyej/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-TheUniversityofColoradoDenver/Bjornstad Pyle Lab/keys.json")

Sys.setenv(
  "AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID" = keys$MY_ACCESS_KEY,
  "AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY" = keys$MY_SECRET_KEY,
  "AWS_DEFAULT_REGION" = "",
  "AWS_REGION" = "",
  "AWS_S3_ENDPOINT" = "s3.kopah.uw.edu"
)
```


```{r echo = F}
# helper functions
plot_rpc_box <- function(data, 
                         y_var, 
                         y_label) {
  ggplot(data, aes(x = rpc2_group, y = .data[[y_var]], fill = rpc2_group)) +
    geom_boxplot(size = 1.4, outliers = FALSE) +
    geom_line(aes(group = record_id), color = "#595758", size = 0.3) +
    geom_jitter(size = 2.5, width = 0, color = "#595758", alpha = 0.5) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 15) +
    theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
          legend.position = "none",
          text = element_text(size = 20)) +
    labs(x = NULL, y = y_label) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("#cfe1b9", "#97a97c", "#89c2d9")) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 2.5, linetype = "dashed", color = "#595758")
}

fit_rpc_lmm <- function(data, 
                        y_var, 
                        fixed = "visit", 
                        random = "record_id",
                        contrast_order = NULL,
                        contrast_method = "revpairwise",
                        adjust = "tukey") {
  if (!is.null(contrast_order)) {
    data[[fixed]] <- factor(data[[fixed]], levels = contrast_order)
  }
  
  f <- as.formula(paste0(y_var, " ~ ", fixed, " + (1|", random, ")"))
  mod <- lmer(f, data = data)
  
  # Fixed-effect coefficients with p-values
  fe <- broom.mixed::tidy(mod, effects = "fixed", conf.int = TRUE) %>%
    mutate(outcome = y_var, .before = 1)
  
  # Estimated marginal means + pairwise contrasts
  emm <- emmeans(mod, as.formula(paste0("~ ", fixed)))
  emm_df <- as.data.frame(emm) %>% mutate(outcome = y_var, .before = 1)
  pairs_df <- as.data.frame(
    contrast(emm, method = contrast_method, adjust = adjust)
  ) %>% mutate(outcome = y_var, .before = 1)
  
  # ICC (between-subject variance / total) — sanity check for the random effect
  vc <- as.data.frame(VarCorr(mod))
  icc <- vc$vcov[vc$grp == random] / sum(vc$vcov)
  
  list(
    model    = mod,
    fixed    = fe,
    emmeans  = emm_df,
    contrasts = pairs_df,
    icc      = icc
  )
}
```

# Data import and cleaning

```{r echo = F, warning = F, results='asis'}
ckd_epi_cr_cysc_2021 <- function(scr, scysc, age, sex) {
  kappa <- ifelse(sex == "F", 0.7, 0.9)
  alpha <- ifelse(sex == "F", -0.219, -0.144)
  sex_coef <- ifelse(sex == "F", 0.963, 1)
  
  135 *
    pmin(scr / kappa, 1)^alpha *
    pmax(scr / kappa, 1)^(-0.544) *
    pmin(scysc / 0.8, 1)^(-0.323) *
    pmax(scysc / 0.8, 1)^(-0.778) *
    0.9961^age *
    sex_coef
}

ckd_epi_cr_2021 <- function(scr, age, sex) {
  # sex: "F" or "M"; scr in mg/dL; age in years
  kappa <- ifelse(sex == "F", 0.7, 0.9)
  alpha <- ifelse(sex == "F", -0.241, -0.302)
  sex_coef <- ifelse(sex == "F", 1.012, 1)
  
  142 *
    pmin(scr / kappa, 1)^alpha *
    pmax(scr / kappa, 1)^(-1.200) *
    0.9938^age *
    sex_coef
}

ckd_epi_cysc_2012 <- function(scysc, age, sex) {
  sex_coef <- ifelse(sex == "F", 0.932, 1)
  
  133 *
    pmin(scysc / 0.8, 1)^(-0.499) *
    pmax(scysc / 0.8, 1)^(-1.328) *
    0.996^age *
    sex_coef
}

harm_dat <- read.csv(file.path(root_path, "Data Harmonization/Data Clean/harmonized_dataset.csv"), na.strings = "")

rpc2_dat <- harm_dat %>%
  filter(study %in% c("RPC2")) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(visit = case_when(visit == "screening" ~ "baseline", T ~ visit),
         eGFR_CKD_epi_cr_cysc = ckd_epi_cr_cysc_2021(creatinine_s, cystatin_c_s, age, sex),
         eGFR_CKD_epi_cysc = ckd_epi_cysc_2012(cystatin_c_s, age, sex),
         eGFR_CKD_epi_manual = ckd_epi_cr_2021(creatinine_s, age, sex),
         albuminuria_cat_binary = case_when(acr_u < 30 ~ "A1",
                                            acr_u >=30 ~ "A2 + A3")) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(across(where(negate(is.numeric)), ~ ifelse(all(is.na(.x)), NA_character_, last(na.omit(.x)))),
                   across(where(is.numeric), ~ ifelse(all(is.na(.x)), NA_real_, mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE))),
                   .by = c(record_id, visit))

hc_dat <- harm_dat %>%
  filter(study == "CROCODILE" & group == "Lean Control") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(eGFR_CKD_epi_cr_cysc = ckd_epi_cr_cysc_2021(creatinine_s, cystatin_c_s, age, sex),
         eGFR_CKD_epi_cysc = ckd_epi_cysc_2012(cystatin_c_s, age, sex),
         eGFR_CKD_epi_manual = ckd_epi_cr_2021(creatinine_s, age, sex),
         albuminuria_cat_binary = case_when(acr_u < 30 ~ "A1",
                                                     acr_u >=30 ~ "A2 + A3")) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(across(where(negate(is.numeric)), ~ ifelse(all(is.na(.x)), NA_character_, last(na.omit(.x)))),
                   across(where(is.numeric), ~ ifelse(all(is.na(.x)), NA_real_, mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE))),
                   .by = c(record_id, visit))

# read in biopsy master spreadsheet (updated real time)
biopsy_master <- read_excel("/Users/choiyej/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-TheUniversityofColoradoDenver/Bjornstad Pyle Lab/Biopsy master tracker.xlsx", skip = 2) 
colnames(biopsy_master) <- gsub(" ", "_", colnames(biopsy_master))  # Replace spaces with underscores
colnames(biopsy_master) <- gsub("/", "_", colnames(biopsy_master))  # Replace slashes with underscores
colnames(biopsy_master) <- gsub("\\(", "_", colnames(biopsy_master))  # Replace opening parentheses with underscores
colnames(biopsy_master) <- gsub("\\)", "", colnames(biopsy_master))  # Remove closing parentheses
biopsy_master <- biopsy_master %>%
  dplyr::rename(record_id = Study_ID,
                visit = Visit_ID) %>%
  mutate(visit = case_when(Study == "ATTEMPT" ~ visit,
                           Study == "REMODEL" ~ visit, 
                           Study == "IMPROVE" & visit == "4M" ~ "3_months_post_surgery",
                           visit == "12M" ~ "12_months_post_surgery",
                           visit == "Follow-up" ~ "follow-up",
                           T ~ "baseline"),
         record_id = case_when(startsWith(Coenroll_ID__Same_visit_only, "RPC") & !is.na(Coenroll_ID__Same_visit_only) ~ Coenroll_ID__Same_visit_only,
                               T ~ record_id),
         Study = case_when(startsWith(Coenroll_ID__Same_visit_only, "RPC") & !is.na(Coenroll_ID__Same_visit_only) ~ "RPC2",
                            T ~ Study))

biopsy_master_rpc2 <- biopsy_master %>%
  filter(Study == "RPC2")

rpc_dat_hc <- rpc2_dat %>%
  filter(visit %in% c("baseline", "post_treatment")) %>%
  rbind(hc_dat) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(rpc2_group = case_when(group == "Lean Control" ~ "HC",
                                visit == "baseline" ~ "PRE",
                                visit == "post_treatment" ~ "POST")) %>%
  group_by(record_id) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(height_baseline = height[visit == "baseline"][1]) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::mutate(bsa_blht = 0.024265 * weight^0.5378 * height_baseline^0.3964, # haycock equation was used for original BSA
                gfr_bsa_plasma_blht = gfr_raw_plasma * (1.73/bsa_blht),
                erpf_bsa_plasma_blht = erpf_raw_plasma * (1.73/bsa_blht))

rpc_dat_hc$rpc2_group = factor(rpc_dat_hc$rpc2_group, levels = c("PRE", "POST", "HC"))

# biopsy in at least baseline
rpc_bx_dat <- subset(rpc_dat_hc, record_id %in% biopsy_master_rpc2$record_id)
rpc_bx_dat_hc <- subset(rpc_dat_hc, (record_id %in% biopsy_master_rpc2$record_id) | rpc2_group == "HC")

# regardless of biopsy
rpc_nonbx_dat <- subset(rpc_dat_hc, rpc2_group != "HC")
rpc_nonbx_dat_hc <- rpc_dat_hc

# save data for sharing with Michigan
rpc_nonbx_dat_michigan <- rpc_nonbx_dat %>%
  dplyr::select(record_id, visit, bmi, sbp, dbp,
                hba1c, eGFR_CKD_epi, acr_u,
                albuminuria_cat,
                pcasl3d_left, pcasl3d_right, avg_pcascl,
                adc_left, adc_right, avg_c_adc,
                bold_l_bl_cortex, bold_r_bl_cortex, avg_c_r2,
                bold_l_bl_kidney, bold_r_bl_kidney, avg_k_r2,
                total_kidney_volume_ml,
                gfr_raw_plasma, gfr_bsa_plasma_blht,
                erpf_raw_plasma, erpf_bsa_plasma_blht)
# write.csv(rpc_nonbx_dat_michigan, file.path(root_path, "RPC2/Data Clean/rpc2_michigan_052826.csv"), row.names = F, na = "")
```

# Biopsy in at least baseline

## Missingness and outliers

```{r echo = F, fig.height = 7, warning=FALSE}
all_vars <- c("age","weight","height","bmi","sbp","dbp","map","chol_base","ldl","hdl",
              "hba1c","triglycerides","eGFR_CKD_epi", "eGFR_CKD_epi_cr_cysc",
              "acr_u","gfr_raw_plasma",
              "gfr_bsa_plasma", "gfr_bsa_plasma_blht",
              "erpf_raw_plasma","erpf_bsa_plasma", "erpf_bsa_plasma_blht",
              "avg_pcascl", "avg_c_adc","total_kidney_volume_ml",
              "avg_c_r2","bold_l_bl_cortex",
              "bold_r_bl_cortex","avg_k_r2")

gg_miss_var(rpc_bx_dat[, c(all_vars, "visit")], facet = visit) +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 18))
```


```{r echo = F, fig.height = 10, warning=FALSE}
rpc_bx_dat %>%
  dplyr::select(record_id, visit, all_of(all_vars)) %>%
  pivot_longer(-c(record_id, visit)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = visit, y = value, group = record_id)) +
  geom_violin(inherit.aes = F, 
              aes(x = visit, y = value)) + 
  geom_line(alpha = 0.3) + 
  geom_point(size = 1) +
  facet_wrap(~name, scales = "free_y",
             ncol = 3) +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 15),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 60, hjust = 1)) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL)
```

```{r echo = F, results = 'asis', warning=FALSE}
outliers_3sd <- rpc_bx_dat %>%
  dplyr::select(record_id, visit, all_of(all_vars)) %>%
  pivot_longer(-c(record_id, visit), names_to = "variable", values_to = "value") %>%
  group_by(variable) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    mean_val = mean(value, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_val   = sd(value,   na.rm = TRUE),
    z        = (value - mean_val) / sd_val
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(value), abs(z) > 2) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  arrange(variable, desc(abs(z))) %>%
  dplyr::select(record_id, visit, variable, value, mean_val, sd_val, z) %>%
  arrange(record_id, visit)

kable(outliers_3sd)
```

## Descriptive table

```{r echo = F, warning = F, results='asis'}
# biopsy in at least baseline
summary(arsenal::paired(visit ~ age  + weight + height + bmi + 
                          sbp + dbp + map + chol_base + ldl + hdl + 
                          hba1c + signed.rank(triglycerides, "Nmiss", "medianq1q3") + 
                          eGFR_CKD_epi + eGFR_CKD_epi_cr_cysc + 
                          signed.rank(acr_u, "Nmiss", "median", "q1q3") + 
                          gfr_raw_plasma + gfr_bsa_plasma_blht + 
                          erpf_raw_plasma + erpf_bsa_plasma_blht +
                          avg_pcascl + pcasl3d_left + pcasl3d_right +
                          avg_c_adc + adc_left + adc_right + 
                          total_kidney_volume_ml + left_kidney_volume_ml + right_kidney_volume_ml + 
                          avg_c_r2 + bold_l_bl_cortex + bold_r_bl_cortex + 
                          avg_k_r2 + bold_l_bl_kidney + bold_r_bl_kidney, 
                        data = rpc_bx_dat, id = record_id),
        digits = 1)
```


```{r echo = F, warning = F, results='asis'}
kidney_mri_vars <- list(
  avg_pcascl = "pCASL",
  pcasl3d_left = "pCASL (L)", 
  pcasl3d_right = "pCASL (R)",
  avg_c_adc = "Cortical ADC",
  adc_left = "Cortical ADC (L)", 
  adc_right = "Cortical ADC (R)",
  total_kidney_volume_ml = "TKV",
  left_kidney_volume_ml = "LKV", 
  right_kidney_volume_ml = "RKV",
  avg_c_r2 = "Cortical R2*",
  bold_l_bl_cortex = "Cortical R2* (L)",
  bold_r_bl_cortex = "Cortical R2* (R)",
  avg_k_r2 = "Kidney R2*",
  bold_l_bl_kidney = "Kidney R2* (L)",
  bold_r_bl_kidney = "Kidney R2* (R)"
)

plots <- purrr::imap(kidney_mri_vars, ~ plot_rpc_box(rpc_bx_dat_hc, .y, .x))

purrr::walk(plots, print)
```

```{r echo = F, warning = F, results='asis'}
mm_kidney_mri <- map(names(kidney_mri_vars), 
                  ~ fit_rpc_lmm(rpc_bx_dat, .x))
names(mm_kidney_mri) <- names(kidney_mri_vars)

kable(map_dfr(mm_kidney_mri, "fixed") %>%
  filter(term == "visitpost_treatment"), digits = 2)
kable(map_dfr(mm_kidney_mri, "emmeans"), digits = 2)
kable(map_dfr(mm_kidney_mri, "contrasts"), digits = 2)
```

```{r echo = F, warning = F, results='asis'}
kidney_function_vars <- list(
  gfr_raw_plasma = "mGFR",
  gfr_bsa_plasma_blht = "mGFR (BSA)", 
  erpf_raw_plasma = "ERPF",
  erpf_bsa_plasma_blht = "ERPF (BSA)",
  glomerular_pressure = "Pglo", 
  ff = "Filtration fraction",
  ra = "Ra",
  re = "Re"
)

kidney_function_plots <- purrr::imap(kidney_function_vars, ~ plot_rpc_box(rpc_bx_dat_hc, .y, .x))

purrr::walk(kidney_function_plots, print)
```

```{r echo = F, warning = F, results='asis'}
mm_kidney_function <- map(names(kidney_function_vars), 
                  ~ fit_rpc_lmm(rpc_bx_dat, .x))
names(mm_kidney_function) <- names(kidney_function_vars)

kable(map_dfr(mm_kidney_function, "fixed") %>%
  filter(term == "visitpost_treatment"), digits = 2)
kable(map_dfr(mm_kidney_function, "emmeans"), digits = 2)
kable(map_dfr(mm_kidney_function, "contrasts"), digits = 2)
```

# Regardless of biopsy

## Missingness and outliers

```{r echo = F, fig.height = 7, warning=FALSE}
gg_miss_var(rpc_nonbx_dat[, c(all_vars, "visit")], facet = visit)
```

```{r echo = F, fig.height = 10, warning=FALSE}
rpc_nonbx_dat %>%
  dplyr::select(record_id, visit, all_of(all_vars)) %>%
  pivot_longer(-c(record_id, visit)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = visit, y = value, group = record_id)) +
  geom_violin(inherit.aes = F, 
              aes(x = visit, y = value)) + 
  geom_line(alpha = 0.3) + 
  geom_point(size = 1) +
  facet_wrap(~name, scales = "free_y",
             ncol = 3) +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 15),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 60, hjust = 1)) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL)
```

```{r echo = F, results='asis', warning = FALSE}
outliers_3sd <- rpc_nonbx_dat %>%
  dplyr::select(record_id, visit, all_of(all_vars)) %>%
  pivot_longer(-c(record_id, visit), names_to = "variable", values_to = "value") %>%
  group_by(variable) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    mean_val = mean(value, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_val   = sd(value,   na.rm = TRUE),
    z        = (value - mean_val) / sd_val
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(value), abs(z) > 2) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  arrange(variable, desc(abs(z))) %>%
  dplyr::select(record_id, visit, variable, value, mean_val, sd_val, z) %>%
  arrange(record_id, visit)

kable(outliers_3sd)
```

## Descriptive table

```{r echo = F, results = 'asis', warning=FALSE}
# regardless of biopsy
summary(arsenal::paired(visit ~ age  + weight + height + bmi + 
                          sbp + dbp + map + chol_base + ldl + hdl + hba1c + 
                          signed.rank(triglycerides, "Nmiss", "medianq1q3") + 
                          eGFR_CKD_epi + eGFR_CKD_epi_cr_cysc + signed.rank(acr_u, "Nmiss", "median", "q1q3") +  
                          mcnemar(albuminuria_cat_binary) +
                          gfr_raw_plasma + gfr_bsa_plasma + erpf_raw_plasma + erpf_bsa_plasma +
                          glomerular_pressure + ff + 
                          avg_pcascl + avg_c_adc + total_kidney_volume_ml + 
                          avg_c_r2 + bold_l_bl_cortex + bold_r_bl_cortex + avg_k_r2, 
                        data = rpc_nonbx_dat, id = record_id), digits = 1)

kidney_function_vars <- c(kidney_function_vars, "")
# missing_uacr <- subset(rpc_nonbx_dat, is.na(acr_u))$record_id
# subset(rpc_nonbx_dat, record_id %in% missing_uacr, 
#        select = c(record_id, visit, mrn, date))

# missing_egfr <- subset(rpc_nonbx_dat, is.na(eGFR_CKD_epi))$record_id
# subset(rpc_nonbx_dat, record_id %in% missing_egfr,
#        select = c(record_id, visit, mrn, date))

# # those with baseline >= 30mg/g UACR vs. follow up
# uacr_30_bl <- subset(rpc_nonbx_dat, acr_u > 30 & visit == "baseline")$record_id

# summary(arsenal::paired(visit ~ age  + weight + height + bmi + 
#                            sbp + dbp + map + chol_base + ldl + hdl + hba1c + 
#                           signed.rank(triglycerides, "Nmiss", "medianq1q3") + 
#                            eGFR_CKD_epi + signed.rank(acr_u, "Nmiss", "median", "q1q3") +  
#                            gfr_raw_plasma + gfr_bsa_plasma + erpf_raw_plasma + erpf_bsa_plasma +
#                           glomerular_pressure + ff + 
#                            avg_pcascl + avg_c_adc + total_kidney_volume_ml + 
#                           avg_c_r2 + bold_l_bl_cortex + bold_r_bl_cortex + avg_k_r2, 
#                          data = subset(rpc_nonbx_dat, record_id %in% uacr_30_bl), id = record_id), digits = 1)

?mcnemar.test

mcnemar.test
```

```{r echo = F, warning = F, results='asis'}
plots <- purrr::imap(kidney_mri_vars, ~ plot_rpc_box(rpc_nonbx_dat_hc, .y, .x))

purrr::walk(plots, print)
```

```{r echo = F, warning = F, results='asis'}
mm_kidney_mri <- map(names(kidney_mri_vars), 
                  ~ fit_rpc_lmm(rpc_nonbx_dat, .x))
names(mm_kidney_mri) <- names(kidney_mri_vars)

kable(map_dfr(mm_kidney_mri, "fixed") %>%
  filter(term == "visitpost_treatment"), digits = 2)
kable(map_dfr(mm_kidney_mri, "emmeans"), digits = 2)
kable(map_dfr(mm_kidney_mri, "contrasts"), digits = 2)
```



```{r echo = F, warning = F, results='asis'}
kidney_function_plots <- purrr::imap(kidney_function_vars, ~ plot_rpc_box(rpc_nonbx_dat_hc, .y, .x))

purrr::walk(kidney_function_plots, print)
```


```{r echo = F, warning = F, results='asis'}
mm_kidney_function <- map(names(kidney_function_vars), 
                  ~ fit_rpc_lmm(rpc_nonbx_dat, .x))
names(mm_kidney_function) <- names(kidney_function_vars)

kable(map_dfr(mm_kidney_function, "fixed") %>%
  filter(term == "visitpost_treatment"), digits = 2)
kable(map_dfr(mm_kidney_function, "emmeans"), digits = 2)
kable(map_dfr(mm_kidney_function, "contrasts"), digits = 2)
```
